issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', which means trashing from deck, not hand. Should use a deck-trash action or clarify the correct mechanism.
First action should trash from deck (top of deck), not from hand. The DSL structure does not properly model 'from the top of your deck'.

Missing conditional logic. The 'May trash 2 cards' implies a conditional where the KO action only occurs IF 2 cards are trashed. Current DSL does not model this 'if you trash 2 cards, then KO' relationship properly via thenActions.
